title: Login Issue
description: User reports that they cannot log in even after entering correct credentials. The system repeatedly shows an 'Invalid Email or Password' message. The issue began after the recent update and needs urgent investigation.

title: Payment Gateway Error
description: During checkout, the payment process fails and displays a transaction error. The customer attempted multiple payment methods but none were successful. This issue is affecting overall sales performance.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: The password reset email is not being delivered to the customer. They have checked spam and junk folders without success. The reset functionality may have backend configuration issues.

title: Profile Update Failed
description: User cannot update their profile information including phone number and image. After submitting changes, the page reloads without saving the new data. No error message is displayed.

title: Dashboard Not Loading
description: Customer reports that the dashboard page loads as a blank screen after login. The issue appears only for specific accounts. It might be related to API data fetching failure.

title: Order History Missing
description: Previous orders are not visible in the user's account section. The customer confirmed they had completed transactions last month. Database retrieval may not be working correctly.

title: Notification Delay
description: Push notifications are delivered several hours late. This delay affects order confirmations and account alerts. Notification service may be experiencing performance issues.

title: App Crash on Startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after launching. This issue started after the latest update release. Multiple users have reported similar problems.

title: File Upload Error
description: Users are unable to upload PDF documents successfully. The upload process stops midway and shows a timeout error. Server storage limits should be checked.

title: Search Feature Bug
description: Search results do not match the entered keywords. Even exact phrases return unrelated products. The indexing system may require reconfiguration.

title: Email Verification Failed
description: Verification link sent to the user expires immediately after clicking. The system displays an invalid token message. Email verification service needs debugging.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: Website pages take longer than usual to load on mobile devices. The problem seems related to large image files and unoptimized scripts. Performance optimization is required.

title: Subscription Not Activated
description: Customer completed payment for a premium subscription but access was not granted. Payment record exists in the system. Subscription activation logic may be broken.

title: UI Layout Broken
description: The layout appears misaligned on tablet screens. Some buttons overlap with text content. Responsive design settings need to be reviewed.

title: Download Button Not Working
description: Clicking the download button does not trigger any action. No file is generated or downloaded. JavaScript event handling might be failing.

title: Chat Support Offline
description: Live chat support always shows offline even during working hours. Customers cannot connect with support agents. Chat server configuration should be checked.

title: Incorrect Invoice Generated
description: Invoice generated after checkout shows incorrect total amount. Discount calculations are not being applied properly. Billing logic requires validation.

title: Session Timeout Too Fast
description: User sessions expire within a few minutes of inactivity. This causes inconvenience when filling out long forms. Session timeout configuration may need adjustment.

title: Language Switch Not Working
description: Changing language from the settings page does not update the interface language. The selection resets after page reload. Localization settings might not be saved.

title: Data Sync Problem
description: User data is not syncing across multiple devices. Changes made on one device do not reflect on another. Backend synchronization service should be reviewed.
